who: law firm paralegals processing 5–15 legal documents/week
offer: For law firm paralegals processing 5–15 legal documents/week, inconsistent document formatting causes filing delays. We automate formatting instead of manual formatting by paralegals.
problem: Inconsistent document formatting leads to filing delays.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for law firm paralegals
Indie Hackers discussions on document workflows
DM outreach to law paralegals with demo video
Engage in community forums for legal tools
try_it: Let users try formatting templates on 1-3 documents
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video of the manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save frequently used inputs as templates
Set default reminders for document submissions
Allow CSV import for existing documents
Enable one-click export of formatted reports
Streamline onboarding process for new users
